title: gleichenia hirta var. candida
intro: Gleichenia hirta var. candida, also known as the Australian Tree Fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Gleicheniaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Gleichenia hirta var. candida include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and provide antioxidant protection. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, and are often used to treat skin conditions, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
